_meta.schema: key -> {dates[], values[], n_obs, last_obs, as_of, units, cadence, license_class, transform}
_meta.license_note: source_public: underlying публични факти от първоизточника (PBoC, S&P Global, NAHB/NAR/MBA, €STR/SOFR-derived rates, market FX). derived_only: OTC contributed pricing (inflation swaps, sovereign CDS) → изнесени само z-scored (необратими без mean/σ; запазват ranking за percentile/regime анализ). Без Bloomberg tickers/proprietary metadata.
